message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Design tokens: CSS custom properties foundation","description":"Establish the design token system as a prerequisite for all UI work:
- CSS file with cascade layers: @layer reset, tokens, base, layout, components, utilities
- Design tokens on :root: spacing scale (4px base), color palette (oklch), typography (system-ui), shadows, border radius
- Base styles for body, headings, links, forms, buttons
- Visually-hidden utility class
- Focus-visible styles with sufficient contrast
- prefers-reduced-motion media query wrapper
- Mobile-first responsive foundation
- This must be agreed upon before any feature UI work begins per TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-08T20:24:02.048Z"}
</teammate-message>
